basic_details.job_title: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on 01 June 2026 on the official website iitp.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 32 years Age relaxations for SC/ST/OBC/Women/PwD as per GoI norms.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech/M.E./M.S. in Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronics, Instrumentation and Control, Medical and Biomedical or relevant branches (CPI 6.5/60%, GATE/NET not older than 5 years), B.Tech/B.E./B.S. in Mechanical, Mechatronics, Instrumentation, Biomedical or relevant branches (CPI 6.5/60%, valid GATE/NET), M.Sc. in Mechanical, Mechatronics, Instrumentation, Biomedical or relevant branches (CPI 6.5/60%, GATE/NET not older than 5 years), GATE/NET waiver for CFTI B.Tech/B.E./B.S. with CGPA 8.0 or higher
qualification.details: M.Tech/M.E./M.S. in Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronics, Instrumentation and Control, Medical and Biomedical or relevant branches with CPI 6.5/60% and GATE/NET; or B.Tech/B.E./B.S. with CPI 6.5/60% and valid GATE/NET; or M.Sc. with CPI 6.5/60% and GATE/NET (relaxations apply); GATE/NET waiver for CFTI B.Tech with CGPA 8.0+

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 14-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Patna JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to send your application via email is 14th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have M.Tech/M.E./M.S., B.Tech/B.E./B.S., or M.Sc. in relevant engineering or science disciplines with a specified CPI and valid GATE/NET score.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 32 years. Age relaxations are applicable for reserved categories as per government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37000/- along with House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the IIT Patna JRF position?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach necessary documents, and send it to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is provided in the "Important Links" section of this article for your convenience.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Junior Research Fellow recruitment at IIT Patna is R&D/1491/TMC/585.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: This is a contractual position. The recruitment is for a Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post on a contractual basis.
